content.en:
"A mysterious Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor snatched the Forbidden Treasure?"

Ye Tian was also very surprised when he learned the news from the mouth of the Nine Extremes Legion.

There were many Dao Ancestors who died this time, many of them were Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and in the end, one Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor snatched the body of another Dao Ancestor and finally fled.

But in fact, the battle was too chaotic, this Dao Ancestor grabbed the forbidden treasure, and was quickly killed, and the others grabbed it again.

In case there is a forbidden treasure hidden in the middle of the Dao Ancestor, the forbidden treasure is not in the hands of the mysterious Dao Ancestor, it is impossible to say!

Of course, under the eyes of so many Dao Ancestors, it was also difficult to hide the Forbidden Arcana, so there was a high probability that the Forbidden Arcana was on that mysterious Dao Ancestor.

Regarding the identity of the mysterious Dao Ancestor, no one knows, the other party made a move too quickly, and the aura is very unfamiliar, perhaps it is some kind of secret technique to change the aura, causing no one to recognize other Dao Ancestors.

So far, no one has guessed the identity of that Dao Ancestor.

However, this time the major forces have suffered heavy losses, after all, the true ancestors have fallen a lot, and they have lost some Dao ancestors, and the surviving Dao ancestors have not snatched the forbidden treasure, and dragged their seriously injured bodies to continue to sleep, and the foundation has been damaged, which can be said to be a big loss!

Although Ye Tian was also a little moved by that forbidden treasure, Ouyang Jiu'er said that the forbidden treasure was more chicken, and his heartfelt thoughts were much lower.

"Forget it, let's identify these forbidden and strange things first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This time, he had obtained a total of 67 forbidden strange objects, which was already a terrifying amount, and he had no idea of trading them to Black Wind Mountain.

After all, he had reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor at present, and the other treasures of the Black Wind Mountain were useless to him, so he had nothing to exchange for treasures.

And the forbidden strange things are currently very precious, and everyone lacks them, so he naturally won't be stupid to exchange.

Ye Tian identified the forbidden strange things one by one, and gradually knew the usefulness of these forbidden strange things.

He found that most of the forbidden strange things here were auxiliary cultivation, similar to the effect of divine medicine, which could refine the forbidden body.

There are also forbidden artifacts that can be used as materials to craft forbidden weapons.

Forbidden strange objects are very precious, the lowest level forbidden weapons are more powerful than ordinary Dao weapons, and the top forbidden weapons can easily shatter Dao weapons.

But not everyone can use the forbidden weapon, if you don't master the power of the dark taboo, once you use the forbidden weapon, you will completely kill the enemy in a thousand words and lose eight hundred, and even before you attack the enemy, you will be injured by the forbidden weapon.

What's more, to create a forbidden weapon, just one forbidden strange thing is not enough, you need a variety of forbidden strange things, and you must be able to match them, otherwise it will be a waste of forbidden strange things.

There are also forbidden artifacts that can be used as disposable weapons, defensive weapons, and trapping effects.

"Hey, this forbidden strange thing is good, it can actually escape with people!" Ye Tian stared at a taboo strange object in the shape of a leaf, and said in surprise.

He gave this forbidden strange object a name, called the Forbidden Void Leaf, because this forbidden strange object can mobilize the rules of the forbidden space and escape in an instant, and its escape effect is very powerful.

If the enemy had such a forbidden and strange object, Ye Tian felt that he would not be able to kill the other party, nor would he be able to catch up with the other party.

In addition to the Forbidden Void Leaf, Ye Tian also cared about a forbidden strange object, this forbidden strange thing was the only high-level forbidden strange thing, it could open up a cultivation space, and it contained a gentle dark forbidden power inside, which was very weak, even if people who did not master the power of the dark forbidden entered to cultivate, they could quickly increase their cultivation speed, similar to the effect of the Nine Shades Forbidden Pool.

So, Ye Tian used this forbidden strange object to open up a forbidden space in the human race.

The reason why he didn't open up a forbidden space in the Nine Poles Space was because the Nine Poles Space was in the small realm of the Wind King and was completely under the control of the Wind King.

Therefore, it was impossible for him to place the forbidden space in the small realm of the Wind King!

Although he didn't think that the Wind King would covet a small forbidden space, he had to guard against people.

Moreover, opening up a forbidden space in the Terran Race, one's own family members and some geniuses of the Terran Race can also enter the cultivation, which is more convenient.

The only flaw of the forbidden space is that it needs to incorporate some forbidden strange things that assist in cultivation from time to time, otherwise the forbidden space is just an ordinary space.

As long as there are enough forbidden and strange things, the use of the forbidden space is greater than that of the Nine Secluded Forbidden Pools.

And Ye Tian still has enough forbidden strange things on his body now, enough to support a long time, so he doesn't have to worry about the supply of forbidden strange things.

He was very satisfied with this harvest, although he didn't get the Forbidden Treasure and the top forbidden strange thing, but so many forbidden strange things together were more than the value of a top forbidden strange thing.

Moreover, his forbidden body has also been tempered to the realm of Xiaocheng, which has increased his strength a little again.

It's a pity that he still hasn't broken the shackles, but he already feels that the bottleneck shackles in the dark have been broken by him.

"As long as I cultivate one of my Thousand Dao Techniques to the consummation realm, I will definitely be able to break the shackles and become a Supreme True Ancestor!" Ye Tian muttered.

In the following days, Ye Tian began to practice penance, and made every effort to comprehend the Thousand Dao Techniques of the Great Wilderness Law Body.

---------------

The other side.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The True Martial Palace Lord was deliberating with a number of Nine Heavenly Emperors.

"Who arranged this plan?" the True Martial Palace Lord questioned.

"It's me!" Emperor Guangling stood up and said.

The True Martial Palace Lord stared at Emperor Guangling and said, "Emperor Guangling, this time you sent someone to destroy the Heavenly Spirit Palace, and you also took three forbidden treasures from the Forbidden Ancient Well, and all of them are very valuable forbidden treasures, which is very good! However, you did not cause the battle of the strongest Dao Ancestors of the major forces, and only fell some six or seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors, which could not shake their foundation at all!"

Emperor Guangling hurriedly explained: "True Martial Palace Master, those supreme Dao ancestors don't appear at all, and I can't help it!"

"If it weren't for you making the decision on your own, leaving only an ordinary low-grade forbidden arcana, and it was also a one-time defense forbidden arcana, otherwise how could you not be able to attract the strongest Dao Ancestor?

"But in that case, will the price paid be too great?"

Emperor Guangling was a little reluctant.

"Stupid!" the True Martial Palace Lord scolded, "What if it's a Medium Forbidden Treasure? Once an Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor dies, it is not just as simple as losing a Supreme Dao Ancestor, but the immortality of two Eightfold Heavenly Forces and even the Nine Heavenly Forces! Now, treasure lands similar to forbidden ancient wells will appear one by one, and I hope this will not happen next time!"

At this time, another emperor asked: "True Martial Palace Master, when will our Heavenly Emperor Palace be born? Now that all kinds of forbidden treasures have appeared, if we don't come out, we will lose a lot of forbidden treasures and opportunities! Other forces will continue to rise and grow with the help of these forbidden treasures and opportunities, in that case, it is not a good thing for our Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

"It's not something you have to worry about, your task is to provoke the major forces to fight, as long as there are enough fallen Dao Ancestors, then that's fine!

The True Martial Palace Lord ordered.

"Yes!"

The emperors answered.

The Zhenwu Palace Lord left, and the other emperors also left one by one, but the Guangling Emperor fell into deep thought.

In fact, he didn't know the true mission core of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he only knew that his mission was to constantly provoke the major forces to fight when the signs of birth in the forbidden realm began, causing them to fall a large number of Dao Ancestors.

In short, the more chaotic the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the more Dao Ancestors and True Ancestors who died, the better, but the Heavenly Emperor Palace can't fight them head-on, and destroying the Heavenly Spirit Palace this time is also a limit, and it is not allowed to destroy other forces.

It stands to reason that there is no need for the Heavenly Emperor Palace to be afraid of those forces!

Even if the Heavenly Emperor Palace is born now, there is hope for directly sweeping all the Upper Triple Heaven forces, and there is no need to do this.

But that's what the Heavenly Emperor Palace did, hiding behind the scenes, controlling everything, and not restricting the major forces from improving their strength.

Such a move is strange!

But one thing is certain, that is, the Vast Sea Ancestor has indeed integrated a treasure into the Domain Realm Fragment, which can make the Xuanxu Ancient Realm grow into a forbidden realm.

But as for what kind of treasure it is, it's not very clear!

"The ultimate goal of our Heavenly Emperor Palace should be to create a forbidden realm, but what the specific plan is, I'm afraid only those palace masters know, but they don't tell us!"

Emperor Guangling was also a little annoyed.

After all, he was also one of the high-level leaders of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and he was an invincible Dao Ancestor, but he was not qualified to know the secrets.

"Hmph, when I step into the half-step domain ancestor, see if you say anything!"

Emperor Guangling thought to himself.

Immediately, he thought of his treasures in the Guangling Cold Palace again, and his heart and liver began to hurt again.

"Don't let me know who it is, or I'll kill you!"

Emperor Guangling put down his cruel words and said.
